info.name: Multi-Tenant RBAC API
info.description: Full demo collection — walks through tenant isolation, role hierarchy, permission enforcement, ownership scopes, and audit logging.

exec: console.log('Alice already exists — logging in to get token');
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ email: 'alice@acme.com', password: 'password123' }) }
console.log('Alice token saved via login fallback');

item.name: Register Bob (will be invited as Viewer)

exec: console.log('Bob already exists — logging in to get token');
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ email: 'bob@acme.com', password: 'password123' }) }
console.log('Bob token saved via login fallback');
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ email: 'charlie@acme.com', password: 'password123' }) }
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ email: 'diana@acme.com', password: 'password123' }) }
pm.test('Rejects wrong password (401) or rate limited (429)', () => {

item.name: Bob tries to access Alice's tenant (expect 403)

exec: console.log('Moderator role already exists — fetching from roles list');
const mod = Array.isArray(roles) ? roles.find(r => r.name === 'Moderator') : null;
console.log('Moderator role ID saved from list: ' + mod.id);
pm.test('Moderator role already exists (idempotent OK)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(409));
console.log('Bob already active — fetching userId from users list');
pm.test('All 4 demo users are in the tenant', () => {

item.name: Charlie reads audit log (Admin ✅ — has audit:read)

exec: pm.test('Admin can read audit log (200)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.name: Charlie tries to delete a user (Admin ❌ — no users:delete)

exec: pm.test('Admin cannot delete users — only Owner can (403)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

item.name: Diana creates a post (Editor ✅ — has posts:write)
Diana tries to list users (Editor ❌ — no users:read)

exec: pm.test('Editor cannot read users — Admin+ only (403)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

item.name: Bob tries to create a post (Viewer ❌ — no posts:write)

exec: pm.test('Viewer cannot write posts — Editor+ only (403)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

item.name: Bob tries to delete Alice's post (expect 403 ❌)
Bob creates his own post (after being upgraded to Editor)

exec: console.log('Tenant "beta" already exists — fetching from list');
const beta = Array.isArray(list) ? list.find(t => t.slug === 'beta') : null;
console.log('Tenant B ID saved from list: ' + beta.id);

item.name: Alice creates a secret post in Tenant B

exec: pm.test('Post created in Tenant B', () => pm.response.to.have.status(201));

item.name: Bob tries to read secret post by guessing its ID (expect 404 ❌)

exec: pm.test('IDOR prevented — guessed ID returns 404', () => pm.response.to.have.status(404));
pm.test('Admin does NOT have users:delete (Owner only)', () => pm.expect(perms).to.not.include('users:delete'));
pm.test('Editor does NOT have users:read (Admin+ only)', () => pm.expect(perms).to.not.include('users:read'));

item.name: Bob tries to view audit log (expect 403 — no audit:read)

exec: pm.test('Non-owner cannot read audit log (403)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

item.name: Bob tries to access tenant after removal (expect 403 ❌)

exec: pm.test('Removed user locked out immediately (403)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
